name: mol-agent
description: Per-project agent-harness lifecycle. Three skills: /mol-agent:bootstrap (first-time install), /mol-agent:update (idempotent re-bootstrap with frontmatter refresh + layout migration), /mol-agent:check (presence/health + design-principles audit). Writes only inside CLAUDE.md and .claude/ (notes under .claude/notes/, specs under .claude/specs/).
